blocks.heading: A site that unfolds
blocks.tagline: Every page you open is a fold. Every section arrives like paper opening. Edit anything you see — the creases take care of themselves.

blocks.heading: How this site works
blocks.body:
This whole page is editable. Open the **admin area** and click any page to change its words, add sections, or rearrange them. You never need to touch code, and you can't break the design — the folds, colors and type are locked in place.

Pages are built from stackable sections: a hero banner, text like this, card grids, and image-with-text rows. Add as many as you like, in any order.

blocks.heading: What you can add to a page

items.title: Hero banner
items.text: A big opening statement with an optional red accent word and a supporting line.

items.title: Text section
items.text: Free-form writing with headings, bold, lists, links and inline images.

items.title: Card grid
items.text: Rows of folded-corner cards, like these. Good for services, people, or shows.

items.title: Image + text
items.text: A photo beside a paragraph, with a switch to flip which side the image sits on.
items.linkLabel: See one on the About page
